prestazioni: Engine swap to a Nissan MA10ET (turbocharged 1.0L inline-4 from the March Super Turbo) with a custom billet crankshaft from Tomei and forged pistons by JE (8.5:1 compression for boost resilience). Pair with a Garrett GT15 turbo (TD04-14T compressor wheel) and a custom intercooler setup using a GReddy Type-S front-mount core (2.5" piping, HKS SSQV blow-off valve).

Full standalone ECU conversion using a Haltech Elite 1500 with Nissan Figaro-specific wiring harness by Wireworks Racing, calibrated for E85 flex-fuel with a 3-bar MAP sensor and individual coil-on-plug ignition (Denso Iridium IK22 plugs).

Suspension overhaul with Tein Flex Z coilovers (Figaro-specific valving, 30-way adjustable damping) and Cusco 22mm front / 18mm rear sway bars. Reinforce the chassis with a Cusco bolt-in front strut tower bar and a custom rear subframe brace by Garage Defend (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly).
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny Figaro-specific widebody kit (Pandem Type-3, fiberglass construction) with custom front canards by Voltex and a carbon fiber duckbill spoiler (Seibon). Paint in Nissan’s original “Emerald Green” (code: TH1) with a 3-stage pearl flake by House of Kolor (Kandy Apple Green over Black base).

OEM+ interior with Bride Zeta III seats (Figaro-specific mounting brackets, Alcantara/Suede in “Moss Green”) and a custom MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (14.5" diameter, perforated leather with green stitching). Retain the Figaro’s original digital climate control but replace the stock radio with a Pioneer AVH-Z5200BT (hidden in the glovebox, controlled via iPad Mini in a custom center console mount).

Wheel setup: Work Meister S1 3P 15x7 +25 (front) and 15x8 +30 (rear) in a custom “Gunmetal” finish, wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (195/50/15 front, 215/50/15 rear). Brake upgrade to StopTech Sport rotors (256mm front, 240mm rear) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and stainless steel brake lines by Goodridge.
